full_text:
Tumor tissue was cut and dissociated using Dispase. For 15 ml of enzymatic dissociation medium, I used 14.55 ml of AdF+++ medium (i.e. DMEM/F12 medium (supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES and pen/step), 300 ul Dispase, and 150 ul DNAse. Incubated in the oven for 30 min rotating; RBC lysis buffer 3 mL + 15 mL of AdF+++ medium. After centrifuge, cells were resuspended in 5 mL of the medium, diluted 1:10, and counted.

Cell counts:

Cell count/ml 1):

total: 6.86 E6

live: 3.17 E6

viability: 46.3 %

size: 10.9 um

Cell count /ml 2):

total: 6.45 E6

live: 2.65 E6

viability: 41.1 %

size: 11.2 um

Average cell count/ml:

2.91 E6 x 10 = 29.1 E6 cells/ml

Total cell count: 145.5 E6 cells

(29.1 E6 cells/ml x 5 ml)

Total volume: 5 mL

Overall # of cells in 5 mL was 145.5 E6.

30 E6 cells were frozen, 4.2 E6 cells were plated and the rest were discarded.

Freezing:

1.03 ml of the cell suspension was aliquoted to have 30 E6 cells for freezing. Cells were divided and resuspended to four cryotubes with StemCellBanker (1ml per cryotube). 2 cryotubes contain 5 E6 cells/ml and 2 cryotubes 10 E6 cells/ml. Cells were frozen within a freezing container and then transferred for long-term storage at -80C the following day.

Plating:

144 ul of the cell suspension was aliquoted to have in total of 4.2 E6 cells for plating. Cells were resuspended to DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES and pen/step) + 10 % FBS medium. To a 6-well plate, cells were plated with the following concentrations: 2 plates with 0.3 E6 cells, 2 plates with 0.6 E6 cells, and 2 plates with 1.2 E6 cells. 1 ml medium per well.
